tests.name: subscribe flow > homepage subscribe widget submits and shows success state
subscribe flow > submit button is disabled until consent checkbox is checked
subscribe flow > subscribe widget appears at the bottom of an archive detail page
legal pages > privacy page renders policy heading and key sections
legal pages > terms page renders terms heading and key sections
confirm page status states > success status shows confirmed message
confirm page status states > expired status shows expired message
confirm page status states > invalid status shows invalid message
unsubscribe page > success status shows unsubscribed confirmation
admin analytics page > redirects to login when unauthenticated
admin analytics page > renders metric cards and date controls when logged in
Newsletter send (real Resend) > delivers to all 3 confirmed subscribers; email_sends rows persisted
tests.notes: Real Resend API call. Sends to delivered@/bounced@/complained@resend.dev. Asserts 3 rows in email_sends with non-empty Resend message_ids.

tests.name: Newsletter send (real Resend) > does not duplicate sends on re-run for same archive (idempotency)
tests.notes: Verifies REQ-012 / EDGE-006: duplicate send-newsletter job does not produce duplicate email_sends rows.

ses_setup.event_destination: sns-all-events (BOUNCE, COMPLAINT, DELIVERY, OPEN, CLICK, REJECT)

coverage: Subscribe widget render on / and /archive/:runId (REQ-001, REQ-002)
Privacy and Terms pages render (REQ-025, REQ-026, REQ-027)
Confirm page status states success/expired/invalid (REQ-005, REQ-007, REQ-008)
Pipeline send-newsletter via real Resend API (REQ-011, REQ-024, EDGE-013): 3 confirmed subscribers receive emails, email_sends rows persisted with Resend message IDs
Send-newsletter idempotency (REQ-012, EDGE-006): duplicate job does not duplicate email_sends rows
SES setup script (idempotent) provisions domain identity, DKIM, MAIL FROM, configuration set, SNS topic, and event destination
gaps: Confirm/unsubscribe token round-trip via real DB+browser (Task 3A): token state pages are covered by component-level e2e with stubbed routes; the real-token flow hitting the live API + DB is covered by unit tests but not yet by an e2e Playwright spec.

SNS webhook with real signed payloads (Task 3B): the verifier's cert-fetcher has no test injection point yet; signature verification is covered by unit tests with mocked crypto, not by an e2e HTTP round-trip against the running API.
Analytics with seeded non-zero data (Task 3D): the e2e currently asserts metric cards render; non-zero seeded values + date-range filter behavior is not exercised end-to-end yet.

Subscribe-to-confirm full UI flow against real DB (Task 3E): the existing widget test stubs /api/subscribe; full-stack POST -> DB pending row -> token -> /confirm success is covered by unit tests only.
Real SES production sending: account is in sandbox (max 200/day, verified-recipients-only) — out of scope until DNS records are published and the production-access form is submitted.
Live SNS subscription to the deployed webhook URL: deferred — production deploy required. Local e2e uses simulated payloads.
notes: Real Resend send tests are gated by RUN_NETWORK_TESTS=1 and read RESEND_API_KEY from .env.harness (which lives at the main repo root, not the worktree root — the test resolves it via `git rev-parse --git-common-dir`).

Resend test recipients (delivered@/bounced@/complained@resend.dev) are documented at https://resend.com/docs/dashboard/emails/send-test-emails. Sender uses Resend's no-domain-verification address `onboarding@resend.dev`.
All 403 unit tests in @newsletter/pipeline pass, including newsletter-send worker unit tests.
